projectTabs.moduleNotEnabled: {module} is not enabled for this project

drawingIntelligence.title: BIM — Building Information Module
drawingIntelligence.subtitle: AI engine that reads construction drawings and turns them into structured project knowledge — risks, RFIs, submittals, quantities, schedule and cost impacts — with full evidence traceability.
drawingIntelligence.notStorageNote: This is an intelligence engine, not a document storage area. Files live in Documents; understanding lives here.
drawingIntelligence.emptyDescription: Upload or connect construction drawings to extract project intelligence, detect risks, generate RFIs, identify submittal requirements, and connect drawing data to the Living Graph.
drawingIntelligence.comingSoon: This section will activate once the extraction pipeline processes your first drawings.

library.empty: No drawings in the library yet.

upload.title: Upload or connect drawings
upload.description: Connectors arrive with the ingestion pipeline (Prompt 2). The data model already supports every source below — no vendor lock-in.
upload.manualDescription: PDF, DWG, RVT or IFC files from your computer.
upload.googleDriveDescription: Import drawing sets from shared folders.

global.selectProject: Select a project to open its BIM workspace.
global.noProjects: Create a project first to start using BIM.

aiOperatorCard.title: BIM — Building Information Module
aiOperatorCard.description: Read construction drawings, extract structured knowledge, detect risks and generate RFIs with evidence.

modeDescriptions.quick_scan: Metadata, title block, revision, discipline and notes. No AI cost.
modeDescriptions.standard_analysis: Quick scan plus deterministic risks, RFIs, submittals and schedule/cost candidates. No AI cost.
modeDescriptions.deep_analysis: Standard analysis plus AI enhancement and version deltas. Uses AI tokens — the expensive step.

uploadZone.costNote: Duplicates and drawings without extractable text never trigger AI processing.

versionsTab.empty: No version changes yet — upload a new revision of an existing drawing number to track deltas.

connector.notConfiguredHint: Set APS_CLIENT_ID and APS_CLIENT_SECRET to connect Autodesk Construction Cloud and sync drawings and models into ProjectOps360° for AI-powered interpretation, impact analysis, and Living Graph reasoning.

progress.title: Intelligence pipeline activity
progress.done: Processing complete — results are in the tabs above.
progress.failed: Processing failed — open the drawing to retry.
progress.needsReview: Processed with items needing review — open the drawing for details.

errors.duplicate_file: This drawing already exists in the project
errors.job_not_retryable: Only failed jobs can be retried

actionsMenu.confirmArchive: Archive this drawing? It will be hidden from the library (the stored file is kept).

pipelineHints.failed: Processing failed — retry from the pipeline below

takeoffTab.empty: No material takeoff yet — rows are generated when a drawing finishes AI interpretation.

insights.empty: No insights yet — they are generated when a drawing finishes extraction.
insights.needsReviewNote: This insight needs human review (low confidence or high impact).

detail.title: Drawing detail

detail.evidencePlaceholder: Evidence viewer — exact drawing locations backing each insight will appear here.
detail.needsReviewBanner: AI extraction needs review because confidence is low.

notePlaceholder.done: What was done to complete this task?

cleanup.confirmBody: This task has no milestone. It will be removed from the project (archived — an administrator can restore it). Tasks assigned to a milestone cannot be deleted from the board.

livingGraphObservability.title: Living Graph Observability
livingGraphObservability.subtitle: Internal realtime diagnostics for the Living Graph Realtime Engine.
livingGraphObservability.noProjectSelected: Select a project to start a scoped diagnostic session (one subscription).
livingGraphObservability.inMemoryNote: Runtime counters are in-memory for this session only (per-consumer). Metrics not tracked here show as “not instrumented”, not zero.

realtimeGraph.collapsedHidden: {count} subtask(s) hidden — expand a task to reveal them.
realtimeGraph.largeGraphWarning: This scope is large. Expanding everything may slow the view.

isabella.question: Explain the current state of this project's execution graph: what's progressing, blocked, and what changed recently.

taskExecutionMap.empty: No subtasks yet. Add the first one to start calculating progress.

panel.notFound: This item is no longer available.
panel.closeGate: This task cannot be closed: {count} active subtask(s) are incomplete. An authorized override with a reason is required.

fallback.no_valid_weights: No valid weights — fell back to count-based.
fallback.no_valid_estimates: No valid hour estimates — fell back to the next method.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete this subtask? This is audited and can be restored by an administrator.

isabella.mapQuestion: Explain the execution map of the task "{title}": progress, blockers, overdue subtasks and what to focus on first.
isabella.parentQuestion: Why is the task "{title}" at its current progress, and what is blocking or delaying it?
isabella.subtaskQuestion: What is the status of the subtask "{title}" and how does it affect its parent task?

toolbar.layoutPartial: Saved layout partially applied — the subtasks changed since it was saved.

layoutNotice.saved: Layout saved. It will be restored on your next visit.

phase0.title: Phase 0 — Environment Setup
phase0.description: The local development environment is ready. Next steps: build auth flows, connect dashboard data, and add the OpenAI service layer.

phase0Control.pageDescription: Track and manage your project's foundation setup steps. Mark tasks complete as you progress.

progress.label: Progress
progress.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all progress? This cannot be undone.

0_1.title: Project Scaffolding
0_1.goal: Initialize the Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

criteria.0: Next.js dev server starts without errors
criteria.1: `pnpm build` succeeds with no type errors
criteria.2: App renders at localhost:3000 with sidebar and header

0_1.prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 16 project with App Router, TypeScript strict mode, and Tailwind CSS v4. Install shadcn/ui with base-nova style and the Lucide icon library.

0_2.title: Supabase Project & Auth
0_2.goal: Configure Supabase client libraries, middleware session refresh, and environment variable validation.

criteria.0: Supabase dashboard shows the project is linked
criteria.1: Client and server Supabase clients connect successfully
criteria.2: Environment variables are validated on startup

0_2.prompt: Install @supabase/supabase-js and @supabase/ssr. Create browser and server client factories. Set up Next.js middleware for auth session refresh. Add env validation helpers.

0_3.title: i18n Framework
0_3.goal: Integrate next-intl with [locale] dynamic route, message files for en and es, and a language switcher.

criteria.0: Navigating to /en and /es renders correct translations
criteria.1: LanguageSwitcher toggles locale without full page reload

0_3.prompt: Set up next-intl in a Next.js 16 App Router project. Create the [locale] dynamic route, i18n/request.ts config, routing.ts with locales en and es, and message JSON files. Add a LanguageSwitcher client component.

0_4.title: Layout Shell & Navigation
0_4.goal: Build the persistent AppShell with sidebar, header, and main content area with navigation and active-route highlighting.

criteria.0: Sidebar renders all navigation items from config
criteria.1: Active route is highlighted in the sidebar

0_4.prompt: Create an AppShell layout component with a fixed sidebar and sticky header. The sidebar reads items from a navigation config file, renders Lucide icons, and highlights the active route. The header contains a search bar and notification bell.

0_5.title: Phase 0 Control Page
0_5.goal: Build a self-referencing Phase 0 control page that lists all foundation tasks, tracks progress in localStorage, and shows completion percentage.

criteria.0: Navigating to /phase0 shows all Phase 0 tasks in card layout
criteria.1: Toggling task status persists across page reloads via localStorage

0_5.prompt: Create a Phase 0 control page at /phase0 that reads a static task array and renders each task with its status, estimate, dependencies, acceptance criteria, and a copyable prompt. Store task status and notes in localStorage using a custom hook. Show a progress bar at the top.

0_6.title: Environment & CI Baseline
0_6.goal: Set up .env.local validation, ESLint config, and a GitHub Actions CI workflow for type-check, lint, and build.

criteria.0: validatePublicEnv() throws a clear error when NEXT_PUBLIC_ vars are missing
criteria.2: GitHub Actions workflow runs on push and PR

0_6.prompt: Add env var validation in src/lib/env.ts. Configure ESLint with next/core-web-vitals. Create .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs type-check, lint, and build on Node 22.

0_7.title: OpenAI Integration Stub
0_7.goal: Add a server-side OpenAI SDK wrapper with streaming support and a /api/chat route.

criteria.0: POST /api/chat with { messages } returns a streamed response
criteria.1: OpenAI API key stays server-side only, never exposed to the browser

0_7.prompt: Install the OpenAI SDK. Create src/lib/openai.ts with a streaming chat completion helper. Add src/app/api/chat/route.ts that validates the request and returns a streaming response. Never expose the OPENAI_API_KEY to the client.

0_8.title: First Dashboard Data
0_8.goal: Connect the Dashboard page to Supabase to show real project counts, active members, and task completion metrics.

criteria.0: Dashboard StatCards display live data from Supabase
criteria.1: Empty-state messages appear when no data exists

0_8.prompt: Replace the hardcoded Dashboard stat values with real data from Supabase. Create server actions that query projects, team members, and tasks counts. Show loading skeletons while data fetches. Display friendly empty-state text when counts are zero.

livingGraph.subtitle: Process intelligence map — explore what happened, what depends on what, and what happens if something slips.
livingGraph.recalculateHint: Rebuild the graph from current data (removes deleted milestones/tasks).
livingGraph.noSelection: Select a node or edge to inspect it.

search.placeholder: Search by label, ID or entity…

hints.graphHealthScore: Composite 0–100 score: blockers, bottlenecks, rework, traceability gaps and cycles lower it.
hints.criticalPathRisk: High when a blocked node sits on the critical chain; medium when blockers or cycles exist elsewhere.
hints.activeBottlenecks: Nodes concentrating flow: high degree, long duration or blocker pressure.
hints.traceabilityGaps: Nodes with little or no linked evidence (documents, decisions).
hints.sopCandidates: Completed, stable, well-evidenced segments worth turning into SOPs.
hints.reworkSignals: Nodes involved in delay edges or loop-like paths.
hints.processConfidence: How much signal the graph has: evidence density and graph size.

canonicalKnowledge.viewHint: Canonical graph spec v{version}. Evidence links support findings; they are not process transitions or proof of causality.
canonicalKnowledge.selectHint: Select one finding to reveal its grouped evidence.

status.empty: No Knowledge Objects exist for this project yet.
status.insufficient_evidence: Some Knowledge Objects lack evidence for their current version. The available trace is shown honestly.
status.invalid: The Knowledge projection failed canonical graph validation and was not rendered.
status.error: The Knowledge projection could not be loaded. Operational graph views remain unchanged.

canonicalEvents.viewHint: Read-only projection of the canonical event log. Temporal order is order only — it never implies causality.
canonicalEvents.noCause: No explicit cause recorded — adjacency is temporal only.
canonicalEvents.truncated: Showing the first {count} events. The log was truncated to keep the view readable.
canonicalEvents.empty: No canonical events captured for this project yet.

disabled.title: The canonical event view was disabled by an administrator for rollback or quarantine. Review LIVING_GRAPH_EVENT_RELATIONSHIPS_ENABLED and the disabled-project list.

empty.title: No canonical events captured for this project yet. The events view shows canonical history — not operational tasks.

error.title: The canonical event projection could not be loaded. The events view is unavailable (not a fallback to operational tasks).

truncated.title: Showing the first {count} canonical events. The log was truncated to keep the view readable.

between.pickHint: Pick two endpoints (milestones, tasks, or events) on the graph.
between.twoEndpointsRequired: Pick two endpoints to run the analysis.
between.noPath: No recorded operational path between these endpoints.
between.noEvents: No canonical events in this interval.
between.emptyTitle: There is not enough recorded history to compare these endpoints
between.emptyDescription: Choose endpoints with canonical events. Zero-value metrics would not explain what happened.

drill.hint: Tip: pick two milestones to "View flow" (drill-down) or "Analyze what happened" (between-analysis). Drag cards freely to rearrange the layout.

pathNarrative.title: Path found — {steps} steps · ~{days}d accumulated
pathNarrative.aiSoon: Deterministic analysis — AI narrative arrives with the interpretation engine.

edgeMeanings.caused: This activity directly triggered the next one — a causal dependency in the execution flow.
edgeMeanings.enabled: Completing the source made the target possible — a sequence/enablement link.
edgeMeanings.blocked: The source is preventing the target from progressing. Treat as a high-risk dependency.
edgeMeanings.delayed: The source pushed the target's schedule back — a rework or delay signal.
edgeMeanings.accelerated: The source sped up the target — an efficient handoff worth repeating.
edgeMeanings.informed: An informational/evidence link — context flowed, but no hard dependency.
edgeMeanings.labor_constrained: A labor capacity shortage is constraining this activity or milestone — the required crew is not fully available, creating a downstream schedule risk.

actions.focusGraph: Focus mode — make the graph the protagonist
actions.findPathHint: Path mode: click another node to trace the shortest path to it. Press Esc to cancel.

warnings.largeGraph: This graph is large. Consider Focus mode, filters or Group by entity to keep it readable and fast.
warnings.mobileNotice: Living Graph is optimized for desktop and tablet.

performance.hint: Use subgraph extraction or entity grouping for very large graphs.

timeline.noEvents: No process events recorded yet — the timeline will populate as the project moves.

detailPanel.title: Details
detailPanel.edgeRecommendation: Recommended action: review whether this dependency is still accurate and attach evidence if it represents a real handoff.

insights.bottleneck: This node concentrates flow: {inDegree} incoming and {outDegree} outgoing links with {downstream} downstream nodes. Delays here ripple widely.
insights.rework: This node participates in a delay or loop pattern — work likely came back to it after moving forward.
insights.traceabilityGap: This node has little or no linked evidence (documents, decisions). Its history may be hard to audit later.
insights.risk: This node carries elevated risk and affects {downstream} downstream nodes. Watch it closely.
insights.sopCandidate: This segment completed cleanly and is well-evidenced — a strong candidate to become a standard operating procedure.
insights.blocker: This node is blocked and is holding back {downstream} downstream nodes.
insights.laborCapacityGap: {trade} shows a labor capacity gap of {gap} headcount in week {week}. Required: {requiredHC}, Available: {availableHC}. This affects {downstream} downstream nodes and is {criticalPath, select, 1 {on} other {off}} the critical path.
insights.healthy: No process anomalies detected. {downstream} nodes depend on this one downstream.

recommendations.bottleneck: Recommended: split responsibilities or parallelize work feeding through this node.
recommendations.rework: Recommended: review what caused the loop and add an acceptance gate before this step.
recommendations.traceabilityGap: Recommended: link the relevant document, decision or evidence to this node.
recommendations.risk: Recommended: define a mitigation plan and monitor downstream milestones.
recommendations.sopCandidate: Recommended: document this flow as a reusable SOP.
recommendations.blocker: Recommended: resolve the blocker first — it has the highest downstream leverage.
recommendations.laborCapacityGap: Recommended: confirm resource scheduling, evaluate reallocation from adjacent trades, or activate reinforcement hiring with adequate lead time.

simulation.title: What-if scenarios
simulation.sandboxLabel: Simulation only — no project data changed.
simulation.applyUnavailable: Apply simulation is not available yet
simulation.selectNode: Select a node to run a what-if simulation on it.
simulation.result: This scenario may affect {affected} downstream nodes with an estimated propagation of {delay} days. {critical} of them are on the critical path.
simulation.mitigation: Suggested mitigation: re-sequence parallel work, resolve blockers upstream, or re-baseline the affected milestone dates.

variants.title: Execution Variant Analysis
variants.subtitle: Real execution paths discovered from the project event history.
variants.truncatedNotice: The event window was capped for this analysis; older history is not included.
variants.noReference: No reference variant yet: no compared project has a decided outcome (completed or cancelled). Comparisons will appear once outcomes exist — nothing is inferred.

focus.title: Execution path of {project}
focus.variantShare: Shared by {count} project(s) · {pct}% of analyzed cases
focus.fitness: {pct}% fit vs the most successful variant
focus.noEvents: This project has no business events yet — its execution path will appear as work is recorded.

catalog.title: Discovered variants
catalog.empty: No execution variants yet — they appear as projects record business events.

unauthorized.title: You don't have access to this analysis
unauthorized.description: This project is not available in your workspace or your role does not allow viewing it.

error.title: The analysis could not be loaded
error.description: Something went wrong while computing execution variants. Please try again.

rootCauses.title: Statistical Root Causes
rootCauses.subtitle: Adverse associations between structural factors and delays, blockages and rework — evidence only.
rootCauses.methodNote: Method: 2×2 contingency per factor (lift, phi association, coverage) combined into an Influence Score (0–100), penalized on small samples. These are statistical associations — never confirmed causes, never recommendations, and never about individual people.

findings.title: Adverse associations found
findings.empty: No relevant adverse associations with the current data.

unauthorized.title: You don't have access to this analysis
unauthorized.description: This project is not available in your workspace or your role does not allow viewing it.

error.title: The analysis could not be loaded
error.description: Something went wrong while mining root causes. Please try again.

kpiEngine.title: KPI Engine
kpiEngine.subtitle: Single-definition KPIs computed from canonical data — the same values Isabella and reports use.
kpiEngine.scopeNote: Computed over {tasks} tasks and {milestones} milestones of this project.
kpiEngine.notComputable: Not computable with the current data.
kpiEngine.isabellaHint: Need a custom metric? Ask Isabella (e.g. "median duration of critical tasks") — she translates it into a validated expression over this same engine.

custom.title: Custom KPIs
custom.empty: No custom KPIs yet. Create one from a validated expression — Isabella can translate your request into one.

form.hint: Allowed functions: SUM, AVG, COUNT, MEDIAN, PERCENTILE, CORRELATION, TREND, MOVING_AVERAGE, FORECAST. The expression is validated against the allow-list before saving.

unauthorized.title: You don't have access to these KPIs
unauthorized.description: This project is not available in your workspace or your role does not allow viewing it.

error.title: The KPIs could not be loaded
error.description: Something went wrong while computing the KPIs. Please try again.

milestoneFlow.title: Milestone Process Flow
milestoneFlow.subtitle: Engine-derived execution flow between milestones — health, friction and evidence.
milestoneFlow.selectPrompt: Select a transition to inspect its flow, metrics, findings and evidence.

filters.title: Filters
filters.noMatch: No transitions match the current filters.

uncertaintyNotes.missing_metrics: Metrics are missing for this transition
uncertaintyNotes.ambiguous_blocker_cause: Blocker cause is ambiguous — dependency is a conservative default, not a confirmed cause
uncertaintyNotes.backfilled_only_evidence: Evidence comes only from backfilled events
uncertaintyNotes.insufficient_transition_evidence: Not enough evidence for this transition

metrics.title: Flow metrics
metrics.unavailable: No metrics are available for this transition.

findingsPanel.title: Findings
findingsPanel.ambiguousDependency: The specific cause is unknown — the engine conservatively defaults to dependency. This is NOT a confirmed dependency bottleneck.

isabella.title: Isabella evidence packet
isabella.subtitle: Structured evidence Isabella may use — nothing here is generated language.
isabella.whyDisallowed: Isabella must never assert these claims — the evidence does not support them.

evidence.title: Evidence drill-down
evidence.empty: No evidence references exist for this transition yet.
evidence.unavailableDetail: Detailed evidence records are not available in this view — references only.

noMilestones.title: No milestones yet
noMilestones.description: Milestone Process Flow needs at least two milestones to derive transitions. Create milestones in the Execution Map first.

noTransitions.title: No milestone transitions are available for this project yet
noTransitions.description: The engine could not derive transitions from the current milestones and events. This is honest output — nothing is fabricated.

insufficientEvidence.title: Insufficient evidence
insufficientEvidence.description: Milestone Process Flow has insufficient event evidence for this project. As execution events accumulate, flow intelligence will appear here.

noProjection.description: No health assessment is available for this transition.

empty.noFindings: No blockers or delays were detected for this transition.
empty.noPacket: No Isabella evidence packet exists for this transition.

unauthorized.title: No access
unauthorized.description: You do not have access to this project's milestone flow.

error.title: Milestone Process Flow could not be loaded
error.description: Something went wrong while building the flow projection. Try again — no data was changed.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.dropzone: Drop files here or click to upload
attachments.allowedHint: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, text or images

errors.errorTooManyFiles: You can upload up to 5 files at a time
errors.errorOneParent: An attachment must belong to exactly one task or subtask
errors.errorBothParents: An attachment must belong to exactly one task or subtask
errors.errorNoParent: An attachment must belong to a task or subtask
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do this
errors.parent_not_found: The task or subtask no longer exists
errors.invalid_path: The file could not be stored securely
errors.sign_failed: The file could not be opened
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again

adminConsole.title: Admin Console
adminConsole.subtitle: Platform visibility for companies, users, projects and tasks.
adminConsole.fallbackNote: Platform owners ({email}) always have access. Anyone else needs an active grant below.
adminConsole.noAdmins: No authorized admins in the table yet. Grant the first one below.
adminConsole.noResults: No results match the current filters.
adminConsole.renameErrorInvalid: The name must be between 2 and 120 characters.
adminConsole.grantHint: System admins can see every company, user, project and task in this console, rename any company and manage the global plan catalog.
adminConsole.plansGlobalNote: These plans and prices are GLOBAL: they power the public pricing on the landing page and apply to every company. This is not a company's individual billing — each company's subscription appears in the Companies tab.
